summary: A clip from a Fox News segment with a FOX NEWS ALERT banner. It shows two anchors at a studio desk, then night footage labeled NEW YORK CITY of police officers and a crowd in a city street, and a screenshot of a Department of Homeland Security post with a highlighted passage about an arrest. Lower-thirds read ANTI-ICE PROTESTERS BLOCK BROOKLYN HOSPITAL EXITS TO HELP ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT ACCUSED OF ATTACKING AGENTS, ROUGHLY 200 ANTI-ICE PROTESTERS BATTLE WITH POLICE, and ICE: ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT ATTACKED OFFICERS DURING ARREST, TRIED TO HIT THEM WITH HIS CAR.

script.scene: Two anchors sit at a studio desk; lower-third reads ANTI-ICE PROTESTERS BLOCK BROOKLYN HOSPITAL EXITS TO HELP ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT ACCUSED OF ATTACKING AGENTS.
Night footage labeled NEW YORK CITY shows police and a crowd; lower-third reads ROUGHLY 200 ANTI-ICE PROTESTERS BATTLE WITH POLICE.
A screenshot of a DHS post with a highlighted passage; lower-third reads ICE: ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT ATTACKED OFFICERS DURING ARREST, TRIED TO HIT THEM WITH HIS CAR.
